category_sources: source_facts.description says Nagios remote plugin executor; official README says NRPE executes Nagios plugins on remote hosts.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is Nagios Remote Plugin Executor (NRPE); source_facts.name is nrpe.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to docs/NRPE.pdf and includes purpose, compiling, installing, configuring, and runtime sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/NagiosEnterprises/nrpe, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a Nagios remote plugin executor with nrpe and check_nrpe components.
